request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who values stability and responsibility, I've been really concerned about how our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure puts our national security at risk. It's not just about being self-sufficient—it's about ensuring we can protect our citizens when it matters most. The recent cyber attacks on our allies show how vulnerable we are. Supporting strategic autonomy isn't about isolation; it's about fulfilling our duty to keep our country safe. #NationalSecurityFirst #DutyBeforePolitics
